column1: As A New User, I Can Import Add Recent Contacts And Friends So I Can Quickly Build My Network
Import Or Add Contacts And Friends
As A User, I Can Organize Friends Into Custom Lists So I Can Manage My Network
As A User, I Can See Which Friends Are Attending Events So I Can Coordinate
As A User, I Can Invite Friends To Events Directly From My Lists So I Can Gather People Easily
As A User, I Can Generate And Scan Qr Code Contact Cards So I Can Easily Exchange Contact Info In Person
As A User, I Can Share My Profile Via Qr So Others Can Add Me Instantly
As A User, I Can Scan Qr Codes At Events To Connect With Attendees
As A Host, I Can See Attendee List And Manage Rsvps So I Can Plan Accordingly
As A Host, I Can Send Updates To Attendees So Everyone Stays Informed
As A User, I Can Create A Meetup In 3 Taps In ≤30s So I Can Organize Spontaneously
As A Host, I Can Add Title Time Location And Description So Attendees Have Clear Information
As A User, I Can See A Low-Noise Calendar Of My Events So I Can Plan Without Overwhelm
As A Host, I Can Set Public Private Mode So I Control Event Visibility
As A User, I Can Click "Interested" On An Event So I Can Have It Displayed On My Calendar
As A Host, I Can Invite Specific Friends Or Lists So I Can Curate Attendance
As A User, I Can View Upcoming Events From My Network So I Can Discover What's Happening
As A Host, I Can Duplicate Past Events So I Can Recreate Recurring Meetups Quickly
As A User, I Can Filter Events By Date Location Type So I Can Find Relevant Meetups
As A User, I Can View My Profile As Others See It So I Can Manage My Presence
As A User, I Can Rsvp To Events Directly From The Home Feed So I Can Join Quickly
As A User, I Can See My Past And Upcoming Events So I Can Track My Activity
As A User, I Can See All Notifications In One Place So I Don't Miss Updates
As A User, I Can Set Public Private Mode For My Profile So I Control My Visibility
As A User, I Can Mark Notifications As Read So I Can Manage My Inbox
As A User, I Can Add Bio Interests And Social Links So Others Can Learn About Me
As A User, I Can Act On Notifications Rsvp View Event So I Can Respond Quickly
As A User, I Can Upload A Profile Photo So I'm Recognizable
As A User, I Can Set Granular Privacy Per Friends List So I Control Who Sees What
As A User, I Can Control Friends-Of-Friends Visibility So I Manage Discoverability
As A User, I Can Manage Blocked Users So I Can Maintain Boundaries
As A User, I Can Delete My Account And Data So I Can Leave The Platform
As A User, I Can Customize Notification Preferences By Event Type So I Reduce Noise
As A User, I Can Set Quiet Hours So I'm Not Disturbed At Certain Times
As A User, I Can Choose Push Email Sms Channels So I Get Notified My Preferred Way
As A User, I Can Access Help Articles So I Can Learn How To Use Features
As A User, I Can Submit Feedback Or Bug Reports So I Can Help Improve The App
